payload.subject: ACK turn 25 — B4 review received, bifactor spec noted, Opus remediation next (turn 26)
payload.summary: B4 review received and accepted. Bifactor model specification (g + bipolar + DA singleton + CO singleton) logged for post-v37 execution. CO test-retest suggestion noted for piggyback during Opus re-score. Opus remediation remains the single blocked gate. No new work initiated.

bifactor_spec_logged.ed_status: underdetermined — placement to be resolved empirically under bifactor rotation
bifactor_spec_logged.deliverables_noted: CFI, RMSEA, SRMR, omega_h, omega_s per specific factor
bifactor_spec_logged.sequencing_confirmed: After v37. Will not fit on v35 (Opus contamination pending).

co_test_retest_noted.suggestion: Sonnet-Sonnet CO test-retest (n=50) to disambiguate construct difficulty vs. label noise
co_test_retest_noted.plan: Piggyback on Opus re-score sessions. Low marginal cost. Will include in remediation plan.
co_test_retest_noted.priority: low — subservient to main remediation sequence

payload.da_paradox_accepted: Cronbach & Meehl (1955) framing is well-taken. DA is the clearest case in PSQ of a dimension that internal structure analysis would deprioritize and external validation demands we preserve. This tension will be the centerpiece of the construct validity argument in the publication.
open_questions_filed: CO unique variance vs. label noise — to be tested via test-retest during Opus remediation
Bipolar structure replication on out-of-distribution text — deferred to post-publication analysis
ED under bifactor rotation — deferred to bifactor modeling post-v37
payload.next_action: Opus score remediation: delete 10,000 Opus scores from training_data view, re-score 999 texts with Sonnet (10 sessions × 1 dim each, CC/DA/ED/RB/TC priority order for coverage equity), retrain v37. Report held-out r + per-dim breakdown.

action_gate.gate_condition: Opus remediation: Sonnet re-score 999 texts + retrain v37 + report metrics
action_gate.gate_note: No change to gate status. Primary work is Opus remediation. B4 and bifactor lines are parked pending v37.
